repo_prior_art.cite: none; API §3 ExactID/PartialID catalogues empty and cited q1/pid proposals are panel/network/dose-response, not SVAR cumulants

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: LP/VAR equality under common restrictions; this is mostly constraint-inclusion bookkeeping

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue LP/sign versus non-Gaussian SVAR support-function boundary

published_prior_art.cite: DrautzburgWright2023 plus LanneMeitzSaikkonen2017/GourierouxMonfortRenne2017: closest results refine/identify SVAR rotations but do not state the LP relaxation boundary
Read2022 gives sign/zero rotation algorithms; Guay2021 gives higher-moment identification conditions, not a two-shock LP/SVAR witness

structure_flags.label: Bibliography
structure_flags.one_line: Guay2021 is bibliographically wrong: the verified Guay paper is Journal of Econometrics 225(1), 27-46, not JBES 39(2), 453-464; LanneLiu2026 also appears to omit Luoto and is now published, not merely forthcoming.

novelty_flags.label: Guay2021
novelty_flags.one_line: The checklist/proposal describe a Guay JBES GMM paper, but the verified Guay 2021 paper is 'Identification of structural vector autoregressions through higher unconditional moments' in Journal of Econometrics; JBES GMM is Lanne-Luoto 2021.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the open-set gap currently reads as a generic consequence of omitting the non-Gaussian restriction from the LP set, so it needs a sharper quantitative diagnostic or missed-paper-level comparison to become flagship.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Support functions over R_SVAR are used without assuming R_SVAR(P) is nonempty or declaring an extended-real convention for sup over the empty set.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The formula uses max over I_SVAR and dist(phi_w,I_SVAR) but Assumption two-shock does not require the LP sign interval to intersect the finite cumulant-diagonalizing set.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add an explicit nonempty-SVAR-feasible-set assumption, or state the extended-real support-function convention and handle the empty-set case separately.
Replace the Guay2021 citation with the correct Journal of Econometrics paper and add Lanne-Luoto 2021 if the intended comparator is GMM estimation.

To meet the flagship floor, strengthen Conjecture 1 from generic strict inclusion to a computable cumulant-matching diagnostic with a quantitative support-gap lower bound on an open class of VAR laws.

recommended_next_step: Revise the citation record and well-posedness assumptions, then sharpen the main strict-gap claim beyond generic constraint omission if the target remains flagship.
